description.apartment: Find your perfect stay with our wide selection of apartments. Whether you're looking for a cozy studio or a spacious family home, we have options to suit every need and budget.
description.booking: Easily manage your bookings and reservations. View your upcoming stays, past trips, and keep track of all your travel plans in one convenient place.
description.profile: Manage your personal information, preferences, and settings. Update your profile to ensure a personalized experience tailored to your needs.
description.login: Access your account to manage your bookings, profile, and more. Enter your credentials to log in and enjoy a seamless experience.
description.register: Create a new account to start booking your perfect stay. Join our community and discover a world of travel possibilities at your fingertips.
description.question: Don't have an account?
description.requestResetPassword: We'll send you a code to reset your password
description.setNewPassword: Set new password for your account

slogan.description: Discover comfortable and affordable apartments in the heart of the city
